languages.text: "Вина, боль, отчаяние — все эти чувства застят рассудок и искажают мысли, элантах. Лишь принятие и осмысление содеянного способны истинно возвеличить тебя... или уничтожить окончательно".

"Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."
languages.original_text: "Вина, боль, отчаяние — все эти чувства застят рассудок и искажают мысли, элантах. Лишь принятие и осмысление содеянного способны истинно возвеличить тебя... или уничтожить окончательно".

traits.locale_text: "Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, {name}. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

"Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, {name}. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

"Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

"Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

languages.text: «Culpa, angustia, desesperación... Estos sentimientos nublan la mente y distorsionan los pensamientos, elantach. Solo la aceptación y la comprensión de lo sucedido puede elevarte... o destruirte por completo».
languages.original_text: "Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

traits.locale_text: «Culpa, angustia, desesperación... Estos sentimientos nublan la mente y distorsionan los pensamientos, elantach. Solo la aceptación y la comprensión de lo sucedido puede elevarte... o destruirte por completo».

languages.text: “内疚、痛苦、绝望——所有这些情绪都会蒙蔽心智，扭曲思维，外界人。唯有接受并理解已发生之事，才能让你获得升华……或将你彻底毁灭。”
languages.original_text: "Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

traits.locale_text: “内疚、痛苦、绝望——所有这些情绪都会蒙蔽心智，扭曲思维，外界人。唯有接受并理解已发生之事，才能让你获得升华……或将你彻底毁灭。”

languages.text: "Schuld, Leid, Verzweiflung — alles Gefühle, die den Verstand trüben und Gedanken stören, Elantach. Allein die Akzeptanz und das Verständnis dessen, was getan wurde, kann Euch wirklich erheben ... oder gänzlich zerstören."
languages.original_text: "Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

traits.locale_text: "Schuld, Leid, Verzweiflung — alles Gefühle, die den Verstand trüben und Gedanken stören, Elantach. Allein die Akzeptanz und das Verständnis dessen, was getan wurde, kann Euch wirklich erheben ... oder gänzlich zerstören."

languages.text: « Culpabilité, angoisse, désespoir... Autant de sentiments qui obscurcissent l'esprit et dénaturent la pensée, elantach. Seules l'acceptation et la compréhension du passé peuvent vous aider à grandir... ou vous détruire purement et simplement. »
languages.original_text: "Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

traits.locale_text: « Culpabilité, angoisse, désespoir... Autant de sentiments qui obscurcissent l'esprit et dénaturent la pensée, elantach. Seules l'acceptation et la compréhension du passé peuvent vous aider à grandir... ou vous détruire purement et simplement. »

languages.text: "Suçluluk, ızdırap, umutsuzluk... Tüm bu duygular, zihni gölgeler ve düşünceleri çarpıtır elantach. Yalnızca yapılanların kabullenilmesi ve anlaşılması sizi gerçekten yüceltebilir... Ya da tamamen yok edebilir."
languages.original_text: "Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

traits.locale_text: "Suçluluk, ızdırap, umutsuzluk... Tüm bu duygular, zihni gölgeler ve düşünceleri çarpıtır elantach. Yalnızca yapılanların kabullenilmesi ve anlaşılması sizi gerçekten yüceltebilir... Ya da tamamen yok edebilir."

languages.text: 「罪悪感、苦悩、絶望…これらの感情は心を曇らせ、思考を歪ませる。エルンタッハ。真に自分を高めるか、完全に破壊するかは、行われた事を受け入れ理解する事だけだ。」
languages.original_text: "Guilt, anguish, despair — all such sentiments obscure the mind and distort thoughts, elantach. Only the acceptance and comprehension of what has been done can truly elevate you... or destroy you utterly."

traits.locale_text: 「罪悪感、苦悩、絶望…これらの感情は心を曇らせ、思考を歪ませる。エルンタッハ。真に自分を高めるか、完全に破壊するかは、行われた事を受け入れ理解する事だけだ。」
